name: AsiaMedic Limited
summary: AsiaMedic Limited, an investment holding company, provides healthcare services in Singapore. The company focuses on the management of clinical services in the fields of disease prevention, early illness detection, and medical imaging and aesthetics. It offers health risk assessments and screenings, and anti-aging and health risk management programs for optimized healthy aging and wellness. The company also provides general and subspecialty computerized tomography (CT) and magnetic resonance imaging (MRI) imaging scans for cardiovascular, neuroradiological, ENT, and musculoskeletal imaging, as well as positron emission tomography (PET)/CT imaging for diagnosis, staging, localization, and monitoring progress of cancer and cardiac diseases; and other imaging services, including bone densitometry, ultrasound, mammography, and X-ray. In addition, it operates travel and aesthetic clinics, and family medicine practices, as well as sells pharmaceutical and aesthetic related products. The company was incorporated in 1974 and is based in Singapore.
